name: Magic Lover
original_name: พ่อมดลุ้นรัก
overview: Three wizards, Vivian, Deris and Aphere are chosen to fulfil a quest. Every century, citizens of their realm must journey to the ordinary world to discover their true loves. If they fail to complete their mission in thirty days, they'll be transformed into animals for eternity. Fortunately, they'll each have an assistant to help them along the way.

trailers.title: OFFICIAL PILOT | Magic Lover Series | พ่อมดลุ้นรัก
